calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-25-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Michael Paque appeared via zoom for and with Herb Thomas (petitioner).

Discussion was held regarding reimbursement costs and extraordinary fees being ordinary fees. The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Ng. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-17-2024 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-15-2023 Text Ruling

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-15-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Kevin Urbatsch appearing via zoom for Herb Thomas (petitioner).

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated March 01, 2022 is admitted to probate. Herb Thomas is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for September 17, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Shirly Yawitz is appointed Probate Referee.

The Court issues sanctions in the amount of $250.00 against Kevin Urbatsch payable within 10 days of the order.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Wong. Not reported.
EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-25-2023 Continued To Aug-15-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause will be issued to Kevin P. Urbatsch (attorney) to appear on August 15, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why sanctions per ccp 128 in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against him for failure to appear. Petition for letters of administration is also continued to that date.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Wan. Not reported.

EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-03-2023 Granted Per Written Order
